sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (column1 String, column2 UInt32, column3 Array(String));
UPDATE test_table SET column2 = 3 WHERE column1 = 'test1';
SELECT structureToProtobufSchema('column1 String, column2 UInt32, column3 Array(String)') FORMAT RawBLOB;
SELECT structureToProtobufSchema('column1 Nullable(String), column2 Tuple(element1 UInt32, element2 Array(String))') FORMAT RawBLOB;
